016package edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.dao;
017
018import androidx.lifecycle.LiveData;
019import androidx.room.Dao;
020import androidx.room.Delete;
021import androidx.room.Insert;
022import androidx.room.Query;
023import edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.entity.Fossil;
024import java.util.Collection;
025import java.util.List;
026
027/**
028 * Data Access Object interface for {@link Fossil} entity. Provides methods for creating, reading,
029 * and deleting fossil reference data.
030 */
031@Dao
032public interface FossilDao {
033
034  /**
035   * Inserts a batch of fossils into the database, typically from a webservice call.
036   *
037   * @param fossils Collection of fossils to insert.
038   * @return List of generated primary key IDs.
039   */
040  @Insert
041  List<Long> insert(Collection<Fossil> fossils);
042
043  /**
044   * Retrieves all fossils from the database as observable live data.
045   *
046   * @return LiveData containing list of all fossils.
047   */
048  @Query("SELECT * FROM fossil ORDER BY latin_name")
049  LiveData<List<Fossil>> selectAll();
050  // TODO: 3/16/2026 Review Claude AI's choices: is this needed? probably just wrap in collected_fossil.
051
052  /**
053   * Retrieves a single fossil by its primary key.
054   *
055   * @param id Fossil ID.
056   * @return Fossil with the specified ID, or {@code null} if not found.
057   */
058  @Query("SELECT * FROM fossil WHERE fossil_id = :id")
059  Fossil selectById(long id);
060
061
062  /**
063   * Retrieves a list of unassigned fossils (not referenced by any CollectedFossil).
064   *
065   * @param limit Maximum number of fossils to return.
066   * @return List of unassigned fossils.
067   */
068  @Query("SELECT f.* FROM fossil f "
069      + "LEFT JOIN collected_fossil cf ON f.fossil_id = cf.fossil_stats_id "
070      + "WHERE cf.fossil_stats_id IS NULL "
071      + "ORDER BY RANDOM() LIMIT :limit")
072  List<Fossil> selectRandomUnassigned(int limit);
073
074  /**
075   * Deletes a fossil from the database.
076   *
077   * @param fossil Fossil to delete.
078   * @return Number of rows deleted (should be 1).
079   */
080  @Delete
081  int delete(Fossil fossil);
082  // TODO: 3/16/2026 review...do I even need this? should it be by ID instead?
083
084}
